calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court [Ccp 585]
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff WARREN C. HAVENS, appearing on his own behalf.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NET RADIO GROUP COMMUNICATIONS, a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Warren C. Havens sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment is hereby entered in favor of Plaintiff Warren C. Havens and against Defendant Net Radio Group Communications, a Delaware Limited Liability Company for declaratory relief sought in paragraph 49 of the Complaint, to wit: that the Agreements are valid and enforceable, and that defendant Net Radio is subject to arbitration pursuant to the Agreement for all of the causes of action contained in the Arbitration Demand.
In addition, plaintiff is entitled to court costs of $492,12.
SO ORDERED and the Clerk of this Court is directed to enter this judgment accordingly.
Judgment signed in open court.
